lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਖਰੀ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਜਿਨਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan kharee suhaavanee jin pir jaataa sang |
lines.english: The wife who knows that her Husband Lord is always with her is very beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਾਚੋ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: tribhavan so prabh jaaneeai saacho saachai naae |5|
lines.english: God is known throughout the three worlds. True is the Name of the True One. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਸਾ ਭਲੀ ਪਿਰਿ ਮੋਹੀ ਗੁਣ ਸੰਗਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sach suhaagan saa bhalee pir mohee gun sang |6|
lines.english: The happy soul-bride is true and good; she is fascinated by the Glories of her Husband Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲੀ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਈਐ ਸੋ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੇ ਰੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: mahalee mehal bulaaeeai so pir raave rang |
lines.english: The soul-bride is called to the Mansion of the His Presence, and her Husband Lord ravishes her with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨ ਮਹਿ ਭੂਲੀ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਪਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ban meh bhoolee je firaa bin gur boojh na paau |
lines.english: But now I have lost my way, and I am wandering around in the forest; without the Guru, I do not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵਹੁ ਭੂਲੀ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਉ ਜਾਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naavahu bhoolee je firaa fir fir aavau jaau |7|
lines.english: If I wander around forgetting God's Name, I shall continue coming and going in reincarnation, over and over again. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੀ ਭੂਲੀ ਥਲਿ ਚੜਾ ਥਲਿ ਚੜਿ ਡੂਗਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhoolee bhoolee thal charraa thal charr ddoogar jaau |
lines.english: Wandering around and making mistakes, I climb the plateau; having climbed the plateau, I go up the mountain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਹੁ ਜਾਇ ਪਧਾਊਆ ਚਲੇ ਚਾਕਰ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: puchhahu jaae padhaaooaa chale chaakar hoe |
lines.english: Go and ask the travellers, how to walk on the Path as His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਨੁ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਠਾਕ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: raajan jaaneh aapanaa dar ghar tthaak na hoe |
lines.english: They know the Lord to be their King, and at the Door to His Home, their way is not blocked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਦੂਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੮॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak eko rav rahiaa doojaa avar na koe |8|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One is pervading everywhere; there is no other at all. ||8||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਾਚੋ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ਅਭ ਪੀਰ ॥
lines.translit: niramal saacho man vasai so jaanai abh peer |
lines.english: The Pure, True Lord abides within the mind; He knows the pain of our hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦੇਹ ਸਰੀਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur te niramal jaaneeai niramal deh sareer |
lines.english: Through the Guru, the Pure One is known, and the human body becomes pure as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਮੈਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਲਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re mail naahee niramal jal naae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, filth is washed away by bathing in the Pure Water of the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੈ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਅਗਲੋ ਨਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਜਮ ਤੀਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahajai te sukh agalo naa laagai jam teer |1|
lines.english: With intuitive ease, a great peace is found, and the arrow of death shall not strike you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਾਚਾ ਏਕੁ ਤੂ ਹੋਰੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਭਰੀ ਸਭ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: niramal saachaa ek too hor mail bharee sabh jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You alone are Perfectly Pure, O True Lord; all other places are filled with filth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਕੀਆ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa mandar sohanaa keea karanaihaar |
lines.english: The Temple of the Lord is beautiful; it was made by the Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਵਿ ਸਸਿ ਦੀਪ ਅਨੂਪ ਜੋਤਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: rav sas deep anoop jot tribhavan jot apaar |
lines.english: The sun and the moon are lamps of incomparably beautiful light. Throughout the three worlds, the Infinite Light is pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਟ ਪਟਣ ਗੜ ਕੋਠੜੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਉਦਾ ਵਾਪਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: haatt pattan garr kottharree sach saudaa vaapaar |2|
lines.english: In the shops of the city of the body, in the fortresses and in the huts, the True Merchandise is traded. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਭੈ ਭੰਜਨਾ ਦੇਖੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: giaan anjan bhai bhanjanaa dekh niranjan bhaae |
lines.english: The ointment of spiritual wisdom is the destroyer of fear; through love, the Pure One is seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਸਹਜੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aisaa satigur je milai taa sahaje le milaae |3|
lines.english: If one finds such a True Guru, the Lord is met with intuitive ease. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਸਭ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜੇ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gupat pragatt sabh jaaneeai je man raakhai tthaae |
lines.english: The mysteries of the seen and the unseen are all known, if the mind is kept centered and balanced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਸਿ ਕਸਵਟੀ ਲਾਈਐ ਪਰਖੇ ਹਿਤੁ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kas kasavattee laaeeai parakhe hit chit laae |
lines.english: He draws us to His Touchstone, to test our love and consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਟੇ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੀ ਖਰੇ ਖਜਾਨੈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khotte tthaur na paaeinee khare khajaanai paae |
lines.english: The counterfeit have no place there, but the genuine are placed in His Treasury.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਕਉ ਮਾਗੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਨ ਮਾਗੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh kau maagai sabh ko dukh na maagai koe |
lines.english: Everyone begs for happiness; no one asks for suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਇਉ ਮਲੁ ਜਾਇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aas andesaa door kar iau mal jaae samaae |4|
lines.english: Let your hopes and anxieties depart; thus pollution is washed away. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੈ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukhai kau dukh agalaa manamukh boojh na hoe |
lines.english: But in the wake of happiness, there comes great suffering. The self-willed manmukhs do not understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਦੁਖ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣੀਅਹਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਭੇਦਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sukh dukh sam kar jaaneeeh sabad bhed sukh hoe |5|
lines.english: Those who see pain and pleasure as one and the same find peace; they are pierced through by the Shabad. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਨਿ ਜਨ ਸੇਵਕ ਸਾਧਿਕਾ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: mun jan sevak saadhikaa naam rate gunataas |
lines.english: that the silent sages, the servants of the Lord, and those who practice a life of spiritual discipline are attuned to the Naam, the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦੁ ਪੁਕਾਰੇ ਵਾਚੀਐ ਬਾਣੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਬਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: bed pukaare vaacheeai baanee braham biaas |
lines.english: The Vedas proclaim, and the words of Vyaasa tell us,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਜਿਣਿ ਗਏ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਸੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sach rate se jin ge hau sad balihaarai jaas |6|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the True Name win the game of life; I am forever a sacrifice to them. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਹੁ ਜੁਗਿ ਮੈਲੇ ਮਲੁ ਭਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: chahu jug maile mal bhare jin mukh naam na hoe |
lines.english: Those who do not have the Naam in their mouths are filled with pollution; they are filthy throughout the four ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਅਵਗਣ ਮੁਠੀ ਰੋਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa avagan mutthee roe |7|
lines.english: Those who have forgotten the Naam are plundered by evil; they weep and wail in dismay. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਕਾਲਾ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatee bhaae vihooniaa muhu kaalaa pat khoe |
lines.english: Without loving devotion to God, their faces are blackened, and their honor is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਪਾਇਆ ਡਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat paaeaa ddar kar milai milaae |
lines.english: I searched and searched, and found God. In the Fear of God, I have been united in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਘਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaanai ghar vasai haumai trisanaa jaae |
lines.english: Through self-realization, people dwell within the home of their inner being; egotism and desire depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਭੂਲੇ ਬਾਵਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun man bhoole baavare gur kee charanee laag |
lines.english: Listen, O deluded and demented mind: hold tight to the Guru's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਊਜਲੇ ਜੋ ਰਾਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥੮॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak niramal aoojale jo raate har naae |8|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Name of the Lord are immaculate and radiant. ||8||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਜਮੁ ਡਰਪੈ ਦੁਖ ਭਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jap naam dhiaae too jam ddarapai dukh bhaag |
lines.english: Chant and meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; death will be afraid of you, and suffering shall depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਕਿਉ ਥਿਰੁ ਰਹੈ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh ghano dohaaganee kiau thir rahai suhaag |1|
lines.english: The deserted wife suffers terrible pain. How can her Husband Lord remain with her forever? ||1||
